report.summary: UX audit of 4 new pages, fixed Tailwind dynamic class bug on sentiment dashboard, standardized breadcrumb on fair-token-launches guide, and added real explorer links to DEX screener.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: fair-token-launches-guide-2026: Replaced inline breadcrumb nav with shared Breadcrumb component for consistency with other learn pages (peaq-depin, ondo-finance, etc.)
sentiment-dashboard: Fixed dynamic Tailwind class bug — text-${color}-400 classes not compiled by JIT; replaced with inline style={{ color }} using hex values (#22c55e, #6b7280, #ef4444)
dex-screener: Replaced dead '#' href on 'View on Explorer' link with chain-specific explorer URLs (Etherscan, Solscan, BaseScan, ArbScan, BscScan) and added target=_blank + rel=noopener
dex-screener: Explorer link label now dynamically shows the correct explorer name per chain

sections.title: Visuals Verified
items: OG image API (/api/og) confirmed operational with theme variants for tool, learn, compare, exchange, wallet, and page types
All 4 new pages (fair-token-launches, peaq-depin, sentiment-dashboard, dex-screener) have correct OG metadata pointing to dynamic /api/og endpoint
Sentiment dashboard gauge SVG and sparkline components render correctly with proper color coding

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/peaq-depin-robotics-guide-2026 — clean, uses Breadcrumb component + CSS vars, no issues
/tools/sentiment-dashboard — Tailwind class bug fixed, auto-refresh and loading states verified
/tools/dex-screener — explorer link fix applied, good filter UX with range sliders and expandable rows
